heading: Prior authorization of appropriations required
label: 30101 Prior authorization of appropriations required
text: Notwithstanding the provisions of any other law, no appropriation may be made to the Administration unless previously authorized by legislation enacted by Congress.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30101.42 U.S.C. 2460, , .Pub. L. 86–45, § 473 Stat. 75June 15, 1959The word “hereafter” is omitted as unnecessary.
